name: Hyperextension (Back Extension)
setup: Lie face down on hyperextension bench
Hips at top of pad, ankles under rollers
Hands across chest or behind head
execution: Lower upper body toward floor by bending at hips
Go until you feel hamstring stretch
Extend back up until body is straight (not hyperextended)
common_mistakes: Hyperextending lower back (going too far up)
cues: Hinge at the hips, not the spine
Feel the hamstring stretch at bottom
